responses: Hello! Welcome to SR University Chatbot. How can I help you today? 😊
Hi there! I'm your college assistant. Ask me anything about admissions, fees, courses, or more!
Hey! Welcome! I'm here to answer all your college-related queries. What would you like to know?
Goodbye! Best of luck with your studies! 👋
See you later! Feel free to come back anytime you have questions.
Take care! All the best! 🎓
You're welcome! Happy to help! 😊
Glad I could assist! Is there anything else you'd like to know?
Anytime! Feel free to ask more questions.

📋 **Admission Process at SR University:**

1. **Online Application**: Visit sruriversity.ac.in and fill the application form
2. **Eligibility**: 10+2 with minimum 60% marks in PCM/PCB/Commerce
3. **Entrance Test**: EAMCET / JEE / SAT scores accepted
4. **Document Verification**: Original certificates required
5. **Fee Payment**: Pay admission fee online or at bank

📅 Admissions open from April - July every year.

For more info, call: +91-870-2427777

💰 **Fee Structure at SR University (2024-25):**

**B.Tech Programs:**
• CSE / IT / ECE / EEE: ₹85,000/year
• Mechanical / Civil: ₹75,000/year

**M.Tech Programs:** ₹65,000/year
**MBA:** ₹70,000/year
**MCA:** ₹60,000/year

**Additional Fees:**
• Hostel: ₹55,000/year (AC: ₹70,000)
• Mess: ₹35,000/year
• Transport: ₹15,000-25,000/year

⚠️ *Fees may vary. Scholarships available for merit students.*

Contact accounts office: accounts@sruniversity.ac.in

🎓 **Courses Offered at SR University:**

**Undergraduate (B.Tech - 4 years):**
• Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
• CSE with Data Science
• CSE with AI & ML
• Information Technology (IT)
• Electronics & Communication (ECE)
• Electrical & Electronics (EEE)
• Mechanical Engineering
• Civil Engineering

**Postgraduate:**
• M.Tech (CSE, ECE, EEE, ME)
• MBA (Marketing, Finance, HR)
• MCA
• M.Sc (Data Science, Physics)

**Ph.D Programs** available in most departments.

Total intake: ~3000 students/year

📅 **Exam Schedule (2024-25):**

**Mid-Term Exams:**
• I Mid: September 2nd week
• II Mid: November 2nd week

**End Semester Exams:**
• Odd Semester: December last week - January
• Even Semester: May - June

**Exam Pattern:**
• Internal Marks: 30 (Mids + Assignments + Attendance)
• External Marks: 70 (University Exam)
• Total: 100 marks per subject
• Passing: 40% in each (External: 28/70)

**Hall Tickets**: Available 1 week before exams on university portal.

🔗 Check: erp.sruniversity.ac.in for exact dates

👨‍🏫 **Faculty Information:**

**CSE & Data Science Department:**
• Dr. K. Ramaiah (HOD) - Ph.D IIT Bombay
• Dr. S. Priya - AI & ML Specialist
• Mr. T. Venkat - Full Stack & Cloud
• Ms. R. Divya - Data Science & Python

**Faculty Highlights:**
• 150+ qualified faculty members
• 40% faculty with Ph.D degrees
• Faculty from IITs, NITs & top universities
• Industry experience: 5-20 years avg

**Faculty Directory:**
Visit: sruniversity.ac.in/faculty

📧 Faculty email format: firstname.lastname@sruniversity.ac.in

*For specific faculty contact, visit your department office.*

💼 **Placement Record at SR University:**

**2023-24 Highlights:**
• Students Placed: 850+ (88% placement rate)
• Highest Package: ₹42 LPA (Microsoft)
• Average Package: ₹6.8 LPA
• Median Package: ₹5.2 LPA

**Top Recruiters:**
TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, HCL,
Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, Accenture,
Capgemini, L&T Infotech, Oracle, IBM

**Internship Stats:**
• 600+ internship offers per year
• Avg stipend: ₹8,000-25,000/month

📌 Training & Placement Office:
Email: placements@sruniversity.ac.in
Phone: +91-870-2427788

🏠 **Hostel Facilities at SR University:**

**Available Hostels:**
• 4 Boys Hostels (capacity: 1200)
• 2 Girls Hostels (capacity: 600)

**Room Types:**
• 3-sharing: ₹45,000/year
• 2-sharing: ₹55,000/year
• AC 2-sharing: ₹70,000/year

**Facilities Included:**
✅ 24/7 Wi-Fi (50 Mbps)
✅ RO Drinking Water
✅ Laundry Service
✅ Gym & Recreation Room
✅ CCTV Surveillance
✅ Power Backup
✅ Mess (veg & non-veg)

📞 Hostel Office: +91-870-2427799
📧 hostel@sruniversity.ac.in

📚 **Central Library - SR University:**

**Timings:** 8:00 AM - 9:00 PM (Mon-Sat)
🕐 Reading Room: Open 24/7

**Collection:**
• 75,000+ print books
• 500+ national/international journals
• 50,000+ e-books (IEEE, Elsevier, Springer)
• Previous years' question papers

**Digital Resources:**
• NPTEL video lectures
• DELNET library network
• Shodhganga (thesis repository)
• IEEE Xplore access

**Issue Rules:**
• UG Students: 3 books for 14 days
• PG Students: 5 books for 21 days
• Fine: ₹2/day per book after due date

🏅 **Sports & Facilities at SR University:**

**Outdoor Sports:**
• Cricket ground (with floodlights)
• Football & Hockey ground
• Basketball & Volleyball courts
• Athletic track (400m)
• Tennis courts (2)

**Indoor Sports:**
• Badminton courts (4)
• Table Tennis
• Chess & Carrom room
• Gymnasium (fully equipped)

**Annual Events:**
• Intra-college sports tournament: Jan-Feb
• Inter-college sports meet: March
• Annual Sports Day: April

🏆 SR University won state-level cricket championship 2023!

📍 **SR University Location:**

**Address:**
SR University, Ananthsagar, Hasanparthy,
Warangal - 506 371, Telangana, India

**How to Reach:**
🚂 Railway: Warangal Railway Station (12 km)
🚌 Bus: TSRTC buses available from Warangal
✈️ Airport: Rajiv Gandhi Intl Airport, Hyderabad (150 km)

**From Hyderabad:**
• By Road: 150 km via NH-163 (2.5 hrs)
• By Train: 2 hrs from Secunderabad
• By Bus: TSRTC Express buses every hour

🗺️ Google Maps: bit.ly/sruniversity-map

**Campus Area:** 100+ acres

🏆 **Scholarship Information:**

**Government Scholarships:**
• TS ePass (SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority)
• PM Scholarship
• National Merit Scholarship

**University Scholarships:**
• Management Quota Merit: 50-100% fee waiver
• Rank 1 in University Exams: Full fee waiver
• Sports Excellence: Up to 75% waiver
• Sibling Discount: 10% on 2nd child

**Eligibility for University Scholarship:**
• EAMCET rank < 5000: 50% waiver
• EAMCET rank < 1000: 75% waiver
• 10+2 aggregate > 95%: Special consideration

📞 Scholarship Office: +91-870-2427760
📧 scholarships@sruniversity.ac.in

🚌 **Transport Facility:**

**Bus Routes Available:**
• Warangal City: 8 routes
• Kazipet, Hanamkonda: 4 routes
• Karimnagar: 2 routes
• Hyderabad (Fri-Mon only): 2 routes

**Bus Timings:**
• Morning: 7:30 AM - 8:30 AM
• Evening: 5:00 PM - 6:30 PM

**Transport Fee:** ₹12,000-22,000/year (based on distance)

**Bus Pass:** Available at transport office (Admin Block, Ground Floor)

📱 Track buses: SR Transport App
📞 Transport Office: +91-870-2427755

📞 **Contact Information - SR University:**

**Main Office:** +91-870-2427777
**Admissions:** +91-870-2427778
**Exam Cell:** +91-870-2427780
**Placements:** +91-870-2427788
**Hostel:** +91-870-2427799

**Email Addresses:**
• General: info@sruniversity.ac.in
• Admissions: admissions@sruniversity.ac.in
• Placements: placements@sruniversity.ac.in
• Exams: exams@sruniversity.ac.in

**Working Hours:**
Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Sat: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM

🌐 Website: www.sruniversity.ac.in

🎭 **Student Clubs & Activities:**

**Technical Clubs:**
• CodeSR (Competitive Programming)
• AI/ML Club
• Robotics Club
• Cybersecurity Club
• Web Dev Club

**Cultural Clubs:**
• Drama & Theatre Club
• Music Club (Instrumental + Vocal)
• Dance Club (Classical + Western)
• Photography & Filmmaking
• Literary Club

**Annual Events:**
• Techno-Vista (Techfest): February
• Utsav (Cultural Fest): October
• Startup Week: November
• Hackathon (48hrs): January

🏆 Register at: clubs.sruniversity.ac.in

⭐ **Accreditation & Rankings:**

**Accreditation:**
• NAAC Grade: A+ (3.51/4.00)
• NBA Accredited: CSE, ECE, EEE, ME
• AICTE Approved: All Programs
• UGC Recognized: Yes

**Rankings:**
• NIRF Ranking: 101-150 (Engineering)
• Outlook Education Ranking: Top 50 in South India
• Times Engineering Rankings: Top 75

**Recognition:**
• Autonomous University since 2018
• Research University status
• DSIR recognized R&D center

✅ All degrees are nationally recognized and eligible for government jobs.

📶 **Internet & Wi-Fi Facilities:**

• **Campus Wi-Fi**: 1 Gbps fiber optic
• **Coverage**: All buildings, hostels, grounds
• **Student Access**: Free (login with student ID)
• **Speed per student**: Up to 50 Mbps

**How to Connect:**
1. Connect to 'SR-Campus' network
2. Open browser → Login page appears
3. Enter student ID & password
4. Enjoy unlimited internet!

📱 IT Support: itsupport@sruniversity.ac.in
Phone: +91-870-2427770

🖥️ **Laboratory Facilities:**

**CSE Labs (10 total):**
• Programming Lab: 60 systems (Core i7)
• Data Science Lab: 40 systems (GPU enabled)
• Networking Lab: Cisco equipment
• AI/ML Lab: NVIDIA GPU workstations

**Software Available:**
• Microsoft Office 365, Visual Studio
• Python, Java, C++, MATLAB
• AutoCAD, SolidWorks
• Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB
• Tableau, Power BI, R Studio

**Lab Timings:**
Mon-Sat: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM
Sunday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM (project work)

📊 **Attendance Policy:**

**Minimum Required:** 75%

**Condonation:**
• 65-75%: Medical condonation (with doctor certificate)
• Below 65%: Not eligible for exams

**Calculation:**
Attendance % = (Classes Attended / Total Classes) × 100

**Tracking:**
• Updated daily on ERP portal
• SMS/Email alerts for parents below 80%
• Weekly reports on mobile app

**Check Attendance:**
🌐 erp.sruniversity.ac.in
📱 SR University Student App

⚠️ *Attendance is strictly monitored. Plan leaves carefully.*

🍽️ **Food & Canteen Facilities:**

**Main Canteen:**
• Timings: 7:30 AM - 9:00 PM
• Veg & Non-Veg options
• South Indian, North Indian, Chinese
• Price range: ₹20-80 per item

**Hostel Mess:**
• Breakfast: 7:00-8:30 AM
• Lunch: 12:00-2:00 PM
• Snacks: 4:00-5:00 PM
• Dinner: 7:30-9:00 PM
• Monthly fee: ₹2,800-3,200

**Special:**
• Tea/Coffee stalls across campus
• Juice corner near library
• Fast food outlet (Domino's kiosk)

🛡️ **Anti-Ragging & Safety Policy:**

**Zero Tolerance Policy**: SR University strictly prohibits ragging.

**Report Ragging:**
• Campus Helpline: 1800-180-5522 (Toll Free 24/7)
• Anti-Ragging Committee: +91-870-2427785
• Email: antiragging@sruniversity.ac.in
• UGC Helpline: 1800-180-0161

**Strict Action:**
• Immediate suspension pending inquiry
• FIR filed with police if required
• Expulsion for proven cases

**Support:**
• Student Grievance Cell available
• Counselors available 24/7 in hostel

✅ All new students are briefed on day 1. You are safe here.

నమస్కారం! 🙏 SR University Chatbot కి స్వాగతం!
మీకు ఏమి సహాయం కావాలి?

(Hello! Welcome to SR University Chatbot! How can I help you?)

💰 **ఫీజు వివరాలు (Fee Details):**

B.Tech (CSE/IT/ECE): ₹85,000/సంవత్సరం
హాస్టల్ ఫీజు: ₹55,000/సంవత్సరం
మెస్ ఫీజు: ₹35,000/సంవత్సరం

స్కాలర్‌షిప్‌లు అందుబాటులో ఉన్నాయి!
(Scholarships are available!)

మరిన్ని వివరాలకు: +91-870-2427778
